series_metadata.series_title: Case Hearing Files of Disciplinary Action
series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of the case hearing files of administrative actions initiated by the Commission and will include but is not limited to, the notice for opportunity of hearing, hearing notice, transcripts and exhibits, hearing officer report and recommendation, final order, appeal documents, record certification, record of proceedings, motions, briefs, and court decisions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy converted electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: case is closed, including all appeals exhausted, three years
